title: Prepositions of place
explanation:
Prepositions of place

  • in — inside (in the room, in London)
  • on — on a surface (on the table, on the wall)
  • at — at a point (at the door, at home, at work)
  • under — below (under the bed)
  • next to / beside — near (next to the bank)
  • between — in the middle of two things

questions.text: The bank is [*next to|between|under] the supermarket.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The keys are ____ my bag. | *in | on | at
She works ____ a hospital. | *at | in | on
The café is ____ the cinema and the library. | *between | next | under
The garden is ____ the house. | *behind | under | between
The children are playing [*in|on|at] the garden.
